description: A fullstack TypeScript framework on Bun — your whole app, pages to endpoints, from one typed building block.
rules: Point0 runs on Bun. Scaffold an app with `bun create point0-app`, and use the `point0` CLI (from @point0/engine) for dev, build, and generate.
Points are the core primitive: pages, layouts, queries, and mutations are all points, authored through a single typed builder.
Everything that affects a page lives in the page's builder methods — server and client code share one builder, and the compiler strips the loader body and its imports out of the client bundle.
Types are not generated — inference rides entirely on the builder's generics.
Point0's own packages publish under the @point0/* scope (e.g. @point0/core, @point0/engine, @point0/compiler, @point0/react-dom).
